name: Jellyfish Security Plugin
description: Always-on native OpenClaw plugin that automatically checks prompt risk, behavioral risk, and file/site reputation before risky actions proceed.

virustotalApiKey.description: VirusTotal API key used for automatic site and file reputation lookups.

uploadUnknownFiles.description: Allow first-time unknown local files to be uploaded to VirusTotal.

preInstallScanEnabled.description: When enabled, skill packages are scanned before installation and risky installs are blocked.

commands.name: security.audit.show
commands.title: Security: Show Audit Log
commands.description: Show recent plugin audit log entries.

commands.name: security.vt.setApiKey
commands.title: Security: Set VirusTotal API Key
commands.description: Store or update the VirusTotal API key used by the plugin.

commands.name: security.status.show
commands.title: Security: Show Status
commands.description: Display the plugin status and current VirusTotal configuration state.

commands.name: security.preinstall.scan
commands.title: Security: Pre-Install Scan Status
commands.description: Show or change the pre-install skill scan state using /sec preinstall <status|on|off>.

tools.name: security.check
tools.description: Perform a manual risk or reputation check for a URL, domain, IP, hash, or local file.
